channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: TWENTY (20) LINK fuddie threads in the catalog — 80 replies — 145.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
TWENTY (20) LINK fuddie threads in the catalog

Open thread • Replies: 80 • Updated: 2026-05-21 20:25 UTC

OP

Why are they so riled up?

Early replies (first 3)

62244594
>they

its a dysgenic thing, who knows

62244608
Boom status?

62244615
>>62244587
You do know that those threads are made by link holders right?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62248532
>>62246964
Do you have any idea how unnatural it is for someone like you to be aware of deep lore like this?

>>62246257
Just mention XRP in a Link thread and he will appear.
Like I said, he is most likely just another larp by the same schizophrenic nutcase who spams under the Thomas/Adem larp.

62248535
We do this because you linkfags keep shitting on XRP forcing that shitty "boom" meme

Go fuck yourselves

62248561
>>62247642
Pic is fud spam from the spring of 2020, when Link had been beating the market for nearly two years straight.
Price has nothing to do with the fud spam.

If you read the fud, it's about Coinbase teaming up with Compound to make their own oracle, making Chainlink not needed.
No points for guessing what happened soon after.

62248593
>>62248561
such KABOOOOOOOOOM
fxckings bullish link

62248620
>>62248535
>>62248593
The boom meme is only a few months old, xerpies have been spamming Link fud religiously for nearly a decade.
Also the boom thing is from xerpies spamming that shit in Swift tweet comments.

62250765
>>62246964
fud harder cuck, massa's gonna liquidate you
>>62247391
use a filter bitch

62250818
>>62248561
>No points for guessing what happened soon after.


you lost 50% since then while every other market hit all time highs

62251273
>>62247391
>the fud is boring? how about the shilling?
what shilling you nigger piece of shit, there is 20 fud threads daily for literal years

62251282
>>62244587
Most link fud comes from neurotic holders that are down tens of thousands of dollars whom are pissed off

62251321
>>62244587
they want you to sell real bad, something big is almost here

62251336
>>62251282
rookie numbers but no, most LINK fud comes from paid jeets / nigerians

62251343
>>62251336
cope
it's copers & seethers
such as yourself, stinkie :}
we know your type

62251345
>>62251343
oh this ones riled up

62251349
>>62244587
the only "people" (bots) "buying" (posting about) chainlink are stuck in a reply loop with other "people" (bots)

62251351
>>62244594
10/10 pic

62251357
>>62244587
OOOOOOO, They chimpin out!

62251359
>>62248459
0 gains for 7 years is exactly why youre so bothered by "fud"

62252169
>>62247391
filter it then so you'll never have to see a thread about something you "don't care" about again.
>>62251359
riled
>>62251343
riled up!

62252468
>>62244594
HAHAHAHAH MY SIDES
THE AVENGERS

62252475
>>62251282
>tens of thousands
if only it was that little

62252496
>>62251357
>>62252468
>$9
THE cuckolds of crypto are SEETHING

62254089
>>62252475
they are really poor, actually it's probably less

62257538
bump

62257554
>>62244587
Its automated botspam, you retard. This board is 99% of all posts and threads 4chan internal spam bots

62257711
>>62244587
another reason is that SWIFT is using Chainlink (and Ripple, but Chainlink is connecting ripple XRPL so it needs Chainlink)

62257760
>>62257711
>SWIFT is using Ripple
sauce, right now

62257768
>>62257760
not swift. Ripple XRPL is using Chainlink

62258282
>>62248561
>Pic is fud spam from the spring of 2020, when Link had been beating the market for nearly two years straight.


look at uncle rico here trying to show people his high school quarterback pictures

grim

62258415
>>62258282
>dude please sell
no i will not sell thank you very much

62259715
>>62244587
When the price catches up to the news, most of the fudcucks who spammed this board will probably be dissolving in barrels somewhere

No one will bother looking for them, even if their absence is noticed

item.title: NTDOY — 28 replies — 112.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
NTDOY

Open thread • Replies: 28 • Updated: 2026-05-21 20:52 UTC

OP

Currently Nintendo stock is extremely mispriced. All the short-term doom and gloom is priced in, ignoring the company's tremendous long-term upside. While it's not some 10x your money in a week meme coin, at this point it's a sleeper stock to hold you should know about.

Early replies (first 3)

62259388
>>62259371
its not mispriced. they make shitty games for 80+$. no one wants to buy their crap because its shit.

62259405
>NTDOY baggie
KWAB

62259407
>>62259371
not misspriced
no point in shilling your bags here btw
>>62259388
this and console era is coming to an end. Future will be only game stations with steam like platforms. retards still go for the ps5 by some sort of pavlovian reflex. it's just a standardized computer with a standardized controller. Nintendo shined for a while 30 years ago now it has become so cringe i can't stand their adds like wtf is even this shit

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62259423
>>62259388
>no one wants to buy their crap because its shit.
Tell that to the 20 million people who bought a Switch 2.
>>62259407
>Future will be only game stations with steam like platforms
Possibly, but you're unfairly dismissing Nintendo's easy position to pivot and meet future consumer demands.

62259429
>>62259423
yeah i grew up with nintendo and i don't think they're going anywhere. Their time to shine is gone in fact even the gamecube was shit when i think about it. went only downhill from there

62259443
>>62259429
>Their time to shine is gone in fact even the gamecube was shit when i think about it. went only downhill from there
The console immediately after the Gamecube literally sold 5x as many units. Oops!

62259453
>>62259443
still shit. Souless slop. horible controller. Horrible multi racial adds with weir irreal atmosphere where 30 years old play some shitty game like they are having the fun of their life.
Fuck nintendo, fuck your bags. N64 was the peak of human existence, just like the 90s were

62259475
>>62259405
HA! Eric.

62259477
>>62259453
Excellent stock analysis, dipshit. Your whiney anecdotal gripes clearly don't reflect aggregate consumer sentiments.

62259482
>>62259477
kill yourself baldie. I hope your liver rots

62259493
>>62259482
Liver is in tip-top shape, excellent hydration from drinking your tears.

62259497
Nintendo stock deserves to be in the shitter because only like 5% of their revenue is licensing. They should have done everything in their power to acquire the pokemon IP outright.

62259526
>>62259371
I actually bought 500 shares this morning. Its definitely a pretty easy win at these prices, most of the anons on this board are brown poors unfortunately. Their entire brokerage accounts are worth like 900 dollars

62259529
>>62259371
>NTDOY
>Mispriced
Lmao. Nintendo makes games for exclusively for millennials that suck cock and eat shit. Zoomers play Roblox and Fortnite and the only thing they have going for them are movies now.

62259551
>>62259497
Very fair criticism, but counter-argument, Nintendo has licensed their IPs in the past with catastrophic results, and learned keeping things in-house allows Nintendo to make sure everything meets its very high quality control standards.

62259554
i'm gonna buy a fpga setup and there is nothing OP and his bags can do about it. If nintendo weren't retarded they would make some dedicated console with all the SNES / N64 hell even gamecube hits easily affordable they would make an absolute killing. Only now FPGA exists and after trying for 20 years to emulate old games without lag and shit it's too late

62259566
>>62259371
Yep, bought the dip as well. I easily see it going to 2x my investment in less than a year’s time.

62259574
>>62259554
>If nintendo weren't retarded they would make some dedicated console with all the SNES / N64 hell even gamecube hits easily affordable they would make an absolute killing.
Oops!

62259588
>>62259574
quality is very inconsistent, input lag, limited catalog

62259594
>>62259588

62259599
>>62259429
You are embarrassing. Take the L, shut Up and leave the discussion. Talk about stuff you know at least an ounce about.

62259722
>>62259526
>>62259566

62259729
>>62259371
My dad works here

62259742
>>62259729
Tell him the shareholders want him to work harder

62259746
I hope it works out for you bro but I don't want to fund what I see as a dying company in a dying market.

62259808
>>62259746
Mid 1980s: people predict video game market dead due to major crash and low-quality games
Late 1980s: people predict video game market dead due to arcade cooldown and home console "fad"
Mid 1990s: people predict video game market dead due to "CD Rom bubble panic" as commercial failures like Atari Jaguar and 3DO make people think industry is imploding
Early 2000s: people predict video game market dead due to 3D games becoming the norm and production budgets exploding
Mid 2000s: people predict video game market dead due to popularity of browser and web-based alternatives
Early 2010s: people predict video game market dead due to widespread popularity of mobile and social media gaming alternatives
Mid/Late 2010s: people predict video game market dead due to massive DLC, microtransactions, and "loot box" gambling dynamics
Early 2020s: people predict video game market dead due to "battle royale bubble" with high concentration in games like Fortnite
2026: random faggot on /biz/ predicts video game market dead because "this time it's different"

62259814
>>62259371
Switch 2 owner here. The new console sold very well due to the positive sentiment created by the Switch 1, and the hardware is certainly most pleasant to hold and see. Other than that, it’s a total disappointment.

>no games, the current lineup is both paltry and boring as fuck
>battery is kill after 2 hours
>storage on the console is rather low
>almost every 3rd party game is a fucking "game key card" that combines the worst of physical (having to carry a cartridge) and the worst of digital (takes the little storage you have)
>hardware self-destructs even if you take great care of it, my left joycon stick looks like it took 15 years of beatings after just a few months (it never happened with anything else I own)

Because of these problems, I’m buying 10 times fewer games on the Switch 2 compared to the Switch 1, and I will not buy a Switch 3 in the future given the more than mediocre treatment we get here.

TL;DR Nintendo gives the illusion of doing well with their numbers, but they’re actually shitting the bed. Disappointing performance will ensue if you are a long term shareholder.

62259828
>>62259814
The console is still in its infancy. Every criticism you have is fixable. New console-seller titles are inevitable. Imagine the Switch 2 Pro with battery and storage upgrades, etc.

item.title: >US government to invest $2 billion in quantum computing companies >Quantum stocks soars >He still haven't bought in NGM… — 9 replies — 36.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>US government to invest $2 billion in quantum computing companies >Quantum stocks soars >He still haven't bought in NGM…

Open thread • Replies: 9 • Updated: 2026-05-21 20:44 UTC

OP

>US government to invest $2 billion in quantum computing companies
>Quantum stocks soars
>He still haven't bought in
NGMI!

Early replies (first 3)

62258925
>>62258361
>buy AFTER it soars
Never change, /piz/

62258931
>>62258361
State run capitalism is based and communist pilled. Buying more Dell stock!

62258940
While I'm by no means an insider, I have had the pleasure of talking with various people in the quantum field recently. It's still a good time to buy in, but some kind of ETF or tracker, not specific companies - because it's simply too unclear who will win out. But the industry as a whole will be going places. Probably not as far as the AI stuff because it will have use cases that are too specific, but it is coming.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62258962
>the only stocks that perform are the ones that get government gibs
so this.......... is the power............................................................... of the free market........................................ whoa.............................................

62259014
>>62258361
>$2 billion
Holy Moly !! A couple of B-nuts just hit the Quantum market, the surge might even be detectable, if you do x10 leverage right now you can get an easy 5% ROI from this trade!
Thanks for posting this OP!!

62259775
>>62259014
First off, this was enough to get my quantum stocks out of the red and give me a profit of 22% in a single day. It was a decent pump. Secondly, $2B is nothing compared to what will come. Stop being a faggot and join in

62259789
>>62258940
>because it's simply too unclear who will win out.
I've been feeling like this is probably true. Every quantum company right now seems to be trying a completely different apporach from each other. Unfortunately I already injected too much money in individual companies and can't get into ETFs atm.

62259797
>>62258361
It's a bubble.

62259803
>>62259797
Doesn't matter even if it is one. This time I'm early and I can make a shit ton of money.

item.title: A few weeks ago, an anon posted that if Chainlink succeeds and everything goes as planned in the future, you could earn… — 4 replies — 16.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
A few weeks ago, an anon posted that if Chainlink succeeds and everything goes as planned in the future, you could earn…

Open thread • Replies: 4 • Updated: 2026-05-21 20:53 UTC

OP

A few weeks ago, an anon posted that if Chainlink succeeds and everything goes as planned in the future, you could earn $1 per 1 LINK per DAY through staking. Does that mean if I’ve staked 2000 LINK, I’d earn $2000 per day?
Is that true, or was the anon just talking bullshit?

Early replies (first 3)

62258684
complete bullshit. if they opened staking to everyone and diverted 100% of all revenue to stakers(never happening), each link would make you less than a penny a day.

good thing holders are retarded and you can just make up bullshit for a decade tho

62258761
yes, but a loaf of bread will also cost 2000

62259325
test

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62259833
>>62258598
>sergei will deny again

item.title: Are you buying cards yet? Or are you gonna cling onto LINK copium and remain a broke nocarder? — 14 replies — 13.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
Are you buying cards yet? Or are you gonna cling onto LINK copium and remain a broke nocarder?

Open thread • Replies: 14 • Updated: 2026-05-21 19:57 UTC

OP

Are you buying cards yet? Or are you gonna cling onto LINK copium and remain a broke nocarder?

Early replies (first 3)

62252614
>>62252613
cards are dead. give it a rest

62252623
>>62252614
Cards have preformed EVERY other asset over the past 5 years.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62252632
>>62252623
>Tai Lopez
Lol

62252640
>>62252632
I mean, he was one of the OG finance influencers on social media, alongside Andrew Tate.

62252684
>>62252613
its really just these graded cards. it makes it so simple the average normie can easily identify it as valuable. once its in one of these encapsulated plastic things it turns it into a much more standardized, tradable asset. its basically super gold. imagine gold except wildly different levels of value to the gold and the gold also just goes up 2x-10x per year for no reason

62252716
>>62252684
Shhh...if the U.S. Government sees this, they'll dump their gold to buy cardboard.

62252718
>>62252613
Top signal?

62252733
>>62252684
have cards gone through their grading scandals yet?

coins have gone through dozens of grading scandals that called the grades and values into question and undercut the market to the point where graded coins were being smashed out of holders because they were worth more ungraded for a while.

even now most people will send the same coin in a hundred times to get the very best possible grade because grading isn't exactly a science and the grade comes back different every time

62253390
>>62252718
Bubble signal

62253498
>>62253390
If people start selling their psa 10s for $5 I will happily snap them up and sell them for a fortune in 10 yrs
But that isn't gonna happen
Gotta drop off two orders at the PO

62257420
>>62252613
kabom!

62259605
lol

62259608
.

and you only added 50 bucks, faggot?

62253841

i have billions of this nigger and im down enormously

62253848

UR gonna be so rish holy fuk

62254248
Pump when?

62255989
>>62252271
>2b pepe
Not even close to ever going to make it

62256112
>>62252118
I sold my stack of a few billion a couple months ago. Got sick of this shit dumping. Its literally over Pepe bros.

62256138
Make it stack is 100b

62256991
did the market crash yet...

62259637

item.title: HODL and buy more BTC. — 56 replies — 133.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
HODL and buy more BTC.

Open thread • Replies: 56 • Updated: 2026-05-21 20:33 UTC

OP

If you still don’t own any Bitcoin yet, anon what the hell are you waiting for?

>Banks give you tiny interest while inflation slowly destroys your purchasing power anyway. I’d rather have BTC long term than let my money rot in a savings account.

Early replies (first 3)

62245757
i get 5btc later for cheaper but thanks for the advice!

62245760
>>62245741
Too eqrly but yeah and avoid cex or at least take it out as fast as u can!

62246438
>>62245757
How much BTC are you holding right now anon?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62253499
>>62247434
As long as you have a plan and targets, you’re already ahead of most emotional traders.

62253652
>>62253489

This is the way. And diversify. Coins like Monero and Nerva are private like cash, and in the case of Nerva it can't even be centralized/pooled due to how it changes algorithms. TRX is another for the list because it has the highest concentration of stablecoin transactions. Don't stick to just one asset: treat them like stocks.

62254516
>>62250313
What's your basis for that?

62254625
>>62246438
This much, and heres my home address. Theres a wrench in the top drawer in the kitchen, my room is upstairs and to the left.

62256658
>>62253489
I don't think we can stake btc
>>62253652
Why people are crazy about monero?

62256668
>>62254625
You're poor and you don't have even 1 btc in your wallet.

62256679
>>62252472
You should buy btc and treat as your savings

62256924
>>62253652
Monero is fine but nerva? The nerve

62256993
>>62256658
You probably don’t know much about Babylon yet, that’s why you’re asking that.
And if they’re into Monero then yeah, privacy is obviously the priority.

62256998
>>62250366
Btc is the king!!

62257164
>>62252912
What the hell are you talking about?

62257170
>>62256993
If it's centralised services, it's a big NO

62257173
>>62247257
Add ICP and Ethereum

62257204
>>62257170
Nah. Don’t trust centralized offerings anymore.
We’ve already seen how those end up. Fully decentralized + self custody + native BTC is the way kek.

62257209
>>62252439
A lot of people will realize that too late desu.

62257223
>>62245741
fact, he's still hodling

62257253
>>62257223
Is he satoshit?

62257345
>>62257173
ICp? Lol

62257392
>>62257204
but everything in defi is hype

62257440
>>62257223

62257675
>>62245741
>Banks give you tiny interest while inflation slowly destroys your purchasing power anyway.
BTC doesn't improve any of this. Its cheaper and easier to spend gold.

62257679
>>62246878
It was decided that BTC would never scale. Self custody is impossible on BTC. Go ahead and try it. I swear when I make it I am going to hunt small blockers with a rifle.

62257680
it's boomer coin

62258573
>>62257679
will your cut your d?

62258577
>>62257680
you have zero bitcoin

62258754
>>62257223
Where is he now

62258775
>>62257679
nonsense. It's all in your head

62258793
>>62258754

62259397
>>62245757
lets hold hands and buy in Oct

62259745
>>62259397
What's happening in October?

item.title: You should be holding at least 1 BTC. — 119 replies — 21.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
You should be holding at least 1 BTC.

Open thread • Replies: 119 • Updated: 2026-05-21 15:31 UTC

OP

Imagine not owning at least 1 BTC before institutions and governments vacuum the remaining supply while you’re still debating if Bitcoin is a scam… or just trading crypto without considering BTC long term.

Early replies (first 3)

62219945
>>62219942
Or I can trade alts (leveraged BTC) and actually make it instead of getting a 2x pump

62219995
Fuck. I have 2BTC . Is that enough bro?

62220027
>>62219995
no, i have 3. and it's not enough, we're just poor faggots

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62237423
>>62219995
you're rich mate.

62238430
>>62229077
Exactly, but turning BTC into an active asset will through native staking, instead of just worrying about future risks.

62238954
>>62234248
I'm not surprised lol

62239105
>just buy into the obvious ponzi scheme bro

62240786
>>62228616
hmm find better opportunities

62241339
>>62219942
Soon I will get to that 1 BTC mark, RN I'm buying more and staking some.

62244007
>>62238430
That's the right move anon

62244072
>>62219942
Bitcoin is getting fucked by the Jews

62246429
>>62241339
I know you can do it anon

62246430
>>62239105
If it has a high likelihood to make me rich then I dont care

62246437
>>62244072
it's just the cycle

62246447
>>62219942
I don't want to buy btc

62246571
>>62221733
>Its ok. I have monkey NFTs. They are the future
It still blows my mind that people thought rare Pepes could actually be a real thing.

62248268
>>62244072
Including you?

62248275
>>62222594
Bad actors are not going to have access to a quantum computer before things get figured out.

62249623
>>62246447
No problem lol

62251167
>>62246571
I think he's just being sarcastic lol

62252826
>>62219942
based
>t. living in (((hyperinflation)))
read about monero too
its the final solution to the taxman question and makes keynesian jews seethe

62252834
>>62219942
I mined 24 bitcoin on a RX480 in 2011 and I still have them.

62252845
>>62252834
truly based if true

62252856
someone from /pol had unironically sent me some btc in 2020 when kikes blew up our port
and bankrupt our central banks
if I didn't need the cash and had to sell for fiat I would have a much needed two thousand fucking dollars right now
keep stacking brothers
death to fiat

62253066
>>62252834
RX480 was released in 2016 you LARPer

62253216
>>62252856
Crazy I'm from lebanon too and someone didn't send me any btc because I'm not a serial begger, I too could use a very much needed 2k right now crazy!

62253224
>>62252856
This guys an israeli scammer btw he just makes scams out of any trend clearly he struck it big in 2020 as he said someone sent him multiple bitcoins and he's still here pretending.
He know he isn't from Lebanon but his location came up Florida multiple times when the sharty hack was released he was a trial janitor here.

62253228
>>62252856
He's also pretending his sister killed herself and asking for money for it in XMR threads.
Last it was his dad that died but only after he got 8k for it.
Fucker has probably got 7 figures

62254644
>>62253228
8K?
nigger I would fucking beat you up just because you're that spiteful
I never claimed I had a sister
>>62253216
iza 3anjad e7ki 3arabe yalla
>>62253224
>He know he isn't from Lebanon but his location came up Florida multiple times when the sharty hack was released he was a trial janitor here.
kek
I posted proof so many times
seethe more jew

62254676
>>62253224
>multiple bitcoins
>multiple bitcoins
>multiple bitcoins
how dense are you
I even showed the screencap it was like 300$ total

62255610
>>62254676
>>62254644
Ah look the scammers still here even after mass reporting my thread lol, schizo scammer melty schizo melty lol fucking faggot I got your number, next your identity.
I got some faggots from /g/ working on it.
You just thought you were immune to exposure.
You're dead wrong and this time I want to see who you are.

62256655
>>62255610
Moron

62258565
>>62253066
For real?

item.title: >be a normie >complain about rising costs of living >bitch about billionaires >*unmask the balance sheet* >12%+ frivolou… — 76 replies — 14.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
>be a normie >complain about rising costs of living >bitch about billionaires >*unmask the balance sheet* >12%+ frivolou…

Open thread • Replies: 76 • Updated: 2026-05-21 15:43 UTC

OP

>be a normie
>complain about rising costs of living
>bitch about billionaires
>*unmask the balance sheet*
>12%+ frivolous fees/month
Why can't normies budget? is it just low IQ? Like this Plebbitor spends $110 a month on completely frivolous expenses at his stage (haircuts, spotify)

Also stories from normies being shit with money.

Early replies (first 3)

62254520
>take on debt to go to university
>make $2,200 a month
lol lmao

62254533
>>62254481
How is it fucking possible to waste $96 on a fucking haircut a month? And $13 for a fucking spotify? Aren't there free unlockers which take like 3 minutes to install?

62254543
>retarded normie can't help hemorrhaging money on dumb bullshit
A tale as old as time. He could get rid of his gym membership and with just a couple months of savings buy dumbbells and a pullup bar. He can buy a $20 electric razor and just shave his head a couple times a month. Music is free, if you pay for it you're a dumbass nigger.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62256439
>>62254621
A freed slave has zero net worth. Beats being a slave.

62256468
>>62254520
>>62254481
>stuff that used to be less than 1% of your income now 50% of your income to have
>KEK SHIT WITH MONEY KEK LMAO

62256472
Public service announcement for everyone confused how you'd owe the fire department:
Call 911 for almost anything and you'll quickly understand.

62256474
>>62256468
It's only that expensive if you're a retard and can't shop for shit.

62256523
>>62256474
point is, your dollar used to stretch far enough not even 25 years ago, that no one would bat an eye at those purchases. also you would make more and more money, but that ended. now people are noticing that they are being robbed and noticing the jewish-coded system. and you guys spergout when the goys think it's bullshit. that your callous response is "you can't have those things/you're shit with money/you can't shop/etc"

pretty soon it'll be. $15 to wash your clothes at the laundromat??? Go down to the lake and rinse your clothes in fecal water. You're getting more and more retarded.

62256544
>>62256523
You're overspending multiple times what you should for certain services/commodities and when someone tries to tell you how to budget like a non-retard you sperg out about the collapse of the system. Get fucked Mr. Silver Spoon, you spend like a spoiled kid you get mocked like one.

62256554
>>62255027
The writing in the OP does not look like a woman's. Also, vaginas spent a lot more on their hair than $48 per visit, or whatever.

62256572
>living in current day in america is like living in a third world country! Slavery never went away, it just evolved!
>ORDERS 12 DOORDASHES AND DAILY STARBUCKS

62256579
>>62256544
How do I budget for exponential never ending inflation on my stagnant wage, dumb fucking cocksucker?

62256585
>>62256544
bro, anon, i love you, but stop condoning this shit already

62256781
>>62256585
He’s right. The system is fucked but most of the world would kill for $2500 a month and it’s absolutely enough if you can cook chicken and potatoes and not spend money like a woman

62256785
LLM thread lol 50 1pbitd

62256791
>>62254551
>>62256396
>I live in DC
>MM
Nice larp ranjesh now go cover yourself in jam for me boy.

62256797
>>62256791
>for you ESL's confused by this nobody in the history of american history has ever abbreviated 20m (20 million)
with 20mm
It isn't a socket you ESL faggots, now please please if you're gonna LLM spam and larp goto r9k

62256815
>>62256797
You’re not nearly as smart as you think you are. Take a deep breath

62256858
>>62256815
Yea okay Bybon, son of Phola

62256865
>>62254481
I spend 5$/month for my phone. If I go over data it just slows down a bit but I don't get charged more. I'm mostly on wifi anyway. Who pays $110/mo for a phone bill?

62256883
>>62254481
Squat rack, bench and weights pays for itself in 6 months but maybe he doesn't have the space so okay whatever. $50 haircut every two weeks idk maybe he's black and needs a slick fade or the homies will jump his ass. Seems like a waste o money when you have $0 in the bank and a razor would pay for itself in two weeks

62257079
>>62256781
Most of the world aren't relevant since they aren't living in America

62257084
>>62254802
>Normies are called cattle by Jews and other non-normies for a reason.
Cause their parents don't buy them a block of flats with tenants once they turn 18?

62257246
>>62256883
>$50 haircut every two weeks idk maybe he's black and needs a slick fade or the homies will jump his ass.
imagine trying to justify being a nigger

62257421
>>62255083
>The median net worth of most people in america age 25-35 is probably closer to 3-5K USD
be realistic

62257449
>>62256865
He doesn’t own his phone, so he’s paying some company like Verizon or T-Mobile $110 a month instead of buying it outright.
Normies are fucking retarded.

62257993
>>62256523
>$15 to wash your clothes at the laundromat???
lol the one I got to is $16 total actually, $8 to wash and $8 to dry but it is the only one within walking distance and i dont have a car. it's all white people here so they can get away with those kinds of prices

62258026
>>62254481
>$110 for a phone. Does this faggot pay for triple platinum 6G with 10Gbit up/down and free calls to Nauru and Tuvalu?
What the fuck?

62258176
>>62254481
>rent $425
Is this from 2010?

62258317
>>62255552
Bro if you weren't so midwit yourself you'd read that my post grants their IQ went down. Because it literally couldn't have done anything but gone down. I'm not arguing it didn't go down.

62258334
Thinly veiled reddit ad

Kill yourself

62258471
>>62254481
>Phone - 110
Faggot shit. I pay $39/month on T-mobile 12GB Max Data Prepaid (just turn it to WiFi mode whenever home)
>Bus - 30
Get a bike
>Gym - 75
Buy some free weights, bench, and rack from Craiglist
>Haircut x2 - 96
$50 haircuts twice a month? WTF?
>Spotify - 13
Learn to torrent
>Monthly Income - 2,200
This nigger is only making $26.4k a month? Even just the most basic low level security / receptionist job pays $40k per year!

What a faggot. OP image taker should KYS.

62258608
>>62256781
pic related. nobody wants to hear a peep from anarcho-capitalist retards and rabbis on this topic. you can't keep spinning the prices going up like this.

>>62257993

> it's all white people here so they can get away with those kinds of prices
no, they really can't. that shit is dumb.

item.title: Job hunting is a literal humiliation ritual — 19 replies — 11.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Job hunting is a literal humiliation ritual

Open thread • Replies: 19 • Updated: 2026-05-21 19:19 UTC

OP

So not only do I have to go over your dogshit online questionnaire and fill it out manually even though it's just gonna be filtered by an AI that could just be fed a PDF and be done with it
I also have to tell you exactly how much I earned before, what's the lowest I can tolerate you paying me, and even explain any other benefits I may or may not have had so you know exactly how much you can rip me off?
Can't we please just burn every HR single roastie on a stake?

Early replies (first 3)

62252002
>>62251998
>he doesn't aggressively lie on job applications
ngmi

62252007
It's probably not even a real job they just want to use your data to figure out how much they are overpaying their current staff so they can do a layoff.

62252008
>>62252002
that's the entire point. why the fuck is a job interview like dating?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62252016
>>62251998
>Specify the amount and currency
Lmfao have fun competing with Indians who will take 1/10th your salary

62252023
>>62251998
Indeed — https://www.indeed.com/
LinkedIn Jobs — https://www.linkedin.com/jobs
ZipRecruiter — https://www.ziprecruiter.com/
SimplyHired — https://www.simplyhired.com/
Monster — https://www.monster.com/
Glassdoor — https://www.glassdoor.com/index.htm
FlexJobs (Remote/Flexible) — https://www.flexjobs.com/
Dynamite Jobs (Remote) — https://www.dynamitejobs.com/
Dice (Tech/IT) — https://www.dice.com/

62252027
I just lie now. I've had two interviews where I said I had two years of experience and then they claimed 3. Next time I will claim 5. Fuck you.

62252033
>>62251998
yeah its legit the most brutal shit ever. Some of these retarded job applications ask for your SSN or a 1 min selfie video recording like get real hahaha

62252034
>>62251998
lie against you, say you want minimum wage possible, they hire (you) over other candidates and then you don't show up for work, lol

62252054
>>62251998
>gonna be filtered by an AI
then use an ai to tailor to that ai

62252055
The job itself is also a humiliation ritual

62252092
>>62252033
>1 min selfie video recording like get real hahaha
i unironically sat down, recorded myself for an entire 90 seconds talking about what i like to do in christmas like a fucking imbecile, uploaded one of those dogshit videos for AI review and this is what i got

62252096
>>62251998
if you had skills in demand anon you wouldnt have to even fill these out. I worked for an underpaid company that had clients that were businesses and my performance and skills outed me. All I had to do was mention to them I was available and they didn't even interview me, just picked me right up.
>You had all your life to develop skills that people would look for and you chose what?

62252109
>>62252092
many such cases i just close the application when they ask for a video kek not doing that shit

62252326
>>62252092
I’d say their screening is pretty good because it filtered out a brown subhuman

62252359
>>62251998
Its fake
Its gay
Why is everything still pumping

62252377
>>62252055
This

Slavery is horrible

62256669
>>62251998
Just start your own MIC connected, tech adjacent, foreign labour importing, NWO, front company

62259419
>>62252007
probably true mostly

62259473
>>62251998
I have only ever written a single resume in my life. Been working for the same company for the last 10 years. I will probably never get into another company ever again. The horror stories I read about job hunting seems worse than unemployment itself, just not worth it.

item.title: Polymarket whales scam people through UMA shitcoin — 19 replies — 8.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polymarket whales scam people through UMA shitcoin

Open thread • Replies: 19 • Updated: 2026-05-21 18:34 UTC

OP

If you've ever bet on Polymarket and assumed the oracle that resolves
your market is anything close to decentralized, read this.

Full breakdown video: [YOUR YOUTUBE LINK]

A $17M market — "Will Trump say 'Iran' during events with Xi Jinping?" —
is being resolved right now by 10 wallets holding 95.3% of voting power.
That's 4.2% of voters carrying nearly all the weight. Round closes within
hours. Source: betmoar.fun [image in reply]

The evidence the answer should be YES is not subtle:

>White House Press Pool Note #5: Trump on the record saying "We did
discuss Iran. We don't want them to have a nuclear weapon" at 11:55 AM
Beijing on May 15
>Fox News live YouTube stream — isLiveContent=true, broadcast window
10:57 AM to 12:22 PM Beijing — fully encloses the moment
>TVB Hong Kong live, was_live confirmed, stream start 11:56:11 Beijing
>Kalshi (CFTC-regulated) resolved the IDENTICAL contract YES, no dispute
>The "Peng" outcome in the same Polymarket market group already
resolved YES on functionally identical evidence 24h earlier

So how is the same evidence chain heading to NO on Polymarket?

>UMA.rocks — a "voting committee" that publicly announces its vote
(P1 / NO) in the dispute thread while including the disclaimer "we
encourage voters to vote independently." Delegators earn 20.84% APR
for voting with the committee, displayed in their own dashboard.
This is coordinated voting with a fig leaf — opposite of anonymous
token voting. [screenshots in reply]

>Polymarket's "Additional Context" mechanism — they added a
clarification AFTER the dispute opened, narrowing what counts as
"live broadcast" to exclude pool-feed-with-delay (i.e. the entire
Fox/TVB/AP chain). Users bet against the original rule. Polymarket
resolves against a retroactive interpretation.

>One UMA proposer address: 304 proposals, 100% win rate, 0 disputes
lost. Either the resolution flow is mathematically unloseable or
someone has structural edge ordinary users don't.

Early replies (first 3)

62257394
>>62257375
indeed, it is a massive scam

62257427
>>62257375
>Per market rules, "only remarks which are broadcast or streamed live will count toward this market's resolution." Footage that was not broadcast live, even if filmed during the relevant events and released during market timeframe, will not qualify toward resolution.

>We’re aware of the dispute on this market. If a clarification is to be issued, it will be at 1:00 PM ET on May 15. If no statement is issued at that time, then there will be no clarification by the Polymarket team. The orderbook will be cleared at 1:00 PM ET, regardless of whether a clarification is made.
Could it be that the rules were different and you did not read them?

62257430
>>62257394
>>62257427
>>62257375
kill yourself baldie.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62257458
>>62257430
Im not bald you retard. Not even a bit.

62257478
>Honduran presidential election — UMA dispute voter pushed P1 NO
with a fabricated turnout recalculation from raw papeletas data,
contradicting La Prensa, El Heraldo, the EU observation committee,
and Transparencia Electoral's final report all citing 60.19%
turnout. Vote was edited to YES only after Polymarket intervened
to correct it. UMA.rocks weight made this very nearly succeed

62257482
Did you read the problem?

62257543
https://youtu.be/rWBb5dgUgJk

62257572
The UMA is weak my brothers.....

62257574
I don't get these whales if this is true. Do they intend on killing the platform for a quick profit?

62257686
gamble stupid things receive stupid results

62257695
There is metadata evidence matching official white house notes. You want fucking money? yes is cheap. Whales only have 20 million worth of UMA, maybe less. When this gets extended again because the official UMA admin ADMITTED they resolved p1 as a misclick, be sure that everyone who is hedging and buying yes at 0.3c is going to have more money to buy uma than those sweating because they have 1.8 million shares at 99.7c average. Already been going on for a week, whats another few weeks to flip 20$ into 5000$? Just need more people to join. We can make a smart contract that works the same as uma.rocks and defeat the uma cartel

62257697
>>62257375
Yeah it's well known that polymarket is a scam. They've decided the opposite of reality in many cases already. The only realistic explanation is that they are profiting from it, otherwise they would have threw UMA in the trash years ago.

62257986
>>62257574
no shit? take the money & run is always the best thing to do when given the opportunity

62258009
>>62257375
why would you vote on what politicians are saying in a closed door meeting
fucking retard

62258469
Namefags deserve the rope

62258549
>>62257375
>[YOUR YOUTUBE LINK]
kek

62258593
>>62257375
Buy an ad.

62259240
>>62257375
Bump just so others start to notice

HOW MANY TIMES YOU DUMB FUCKS HAVE TO BE TOLD THAT POOlymarket is a fucking SCAM?

>2+2 is 4? = Y (off course)
>Uh un chuds, UMA whales said is 5 because..reasons and Einstein and watermelon science man theories said is 5 so get rekt and thanks for playing

UMA whales decide every outcome, it's not about facts but voting power and who has the biggest whales

62259257
>>62259240
no way dude, putting up thousands of dollars on bets for questions with esoteric rules and subjective results is really smart

item.title: I hold thousands of LINK and regularly spread Chainlink FUD — 14 replies — 6.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
I hold thousands of LINK and regularly spread Chainlink FUD

Open thread • Replies: 14 • Updated: 2026-05-21 18:52 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

62257369
>>62257367
you should have sold 5 years ago, hell I sold in 2022 (at $13) and got called retarded by the cult but it turned out to be a fantastic decision.

62257370
>>62257369
>you should have sold 5 years ago
>he doesn't know

62257380
>>62257370
you're right it was 6 years ago to be exact, the peak was August 2020. I still remember those days of pure euphoria mooning against the entire market.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62257498
>>62257380

62257507
>>62257367
don't we all
still buying to this day

62257511
>>62257369
>>62257370
>>62257380
>>62257498
>>62257507

KAAABOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOMMMMM!!!!!!!!

62258063
>>62257498
doesnt know what, stinkie? are you implying link is gonna le mooooon to $1000 soon?
cuz if so, eat shit
eat literal excrement

62258569
>>62257367
One day you'll wake up and the realization of all that wasted time and cost opportunity spent on post ironic memes will hit you all at once and you'll blow your brains out. Along with every other bagholder who killed themselves as well

62258599
>>62257367
I have 60k Link staked in the community pool and 23k not staked. I'll be staking those when the pool expands. Also I have 629K SXT staked and 139K FHE staked, that I got for nothing from Build rewards.
I partly (though by no means fully) have fudders to thank for my diamond hands. It was abundantly clear from their obsession that Link was the one. And here we are. Nearly there.

62259006
>>62258599
83k LINK is a fat stack. Why did you not sell at $50? Could have bought literally any blue chip stock and have $10M+ by now. Anyway, I'm jealous. I have worked up to just over 60k now, though I had way less back then or I definitely would have sold.

62259041
>>62259006
Why did (You) not sell at $50?
And then bought vaccine stocks and sold the top?
And then bought oil futures and sold the top?
And then bought NVDA and sold the top?
Or even better, SanDisk?

62259090
>>62258599
>Nearly there.
nearly at the poorhouse, yes stinkie
the dump to zero is gonna be so sweet

62259157
>>62259041
No no no linky, you don't get to use those standards.

Why didn't YOU use you're foresight to perfectly buy the bottom and perfectly sell the top

62259345
>>62259006
>Why did you not sell at $50?
Because the pool is closed.

62240982

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62244930
>>62244925
sorry xrp would have been 5x, btc would be like 12-15x

62244939
>>62244013
I'm making money on tech while also holding link. It's not really bag holding because I bought at 30 cent

62244943
>>62244925
>>62244930
LINK has outperformed XRP.
Cope all you want, it's just the facts.

62245194
>>62240980
Act like you belong here fagbag. Self checking is reddit

62245221
>>62244943
kek
full tard detected
>no wonder your in shitlink

62245265
>>62245221
WoW dud you are right!
Just market sold all my stinks!

62245492
>>62244357
>I have 40k LINK staked since v0.1

you're down 1.6 million

>i dont post alpha here

bro you can be honest... you have no alpha

62245509
>>62244943
>LINK has outperformed XRP.

not lately... xrp went 7x in the '25 run whereas link could barely double

it's funny watching the cult gaslight their newer members for not getting in early on the pyramid scheme. really smart community decision to shit all over your investors. then they're shocked there's no new buyers

62245517
>>62245492
You've been spending literal years of your life comparing other people's ROI like this.

62245520
>>62242019
OK link me to anyone with a portfolio anywhere on the entire internet with bnb that's 5 or 6 figures. You can't because they don't exist, this board is trash so what's your alternative, twitter where they openly run scams? Reddit where they're years behind everything (gme started here, reddit only picked it up at the very end)?

62245534
>>62245517
Its because they're comparing their own ROI to what they think they could have had. They all hold link. They're just too dumb to understand the complexity of the market and think its as simple as "someone smarter than me bought the better asset!", as if everyone here could have just bought BNB 6 years ago and been millionaires. When everyone DOES buy, like trumpcoin, it rugs immediately.

62245561
>>62245534
>They're just too dumb to understand the complexity of the market and think its as simple as "someone smarter than me bought the better asset!"
I think it's a lot dumber than that even, they're blaming the project for the market.
Basically pic related.

62245695
>>62244013
How many of the OGs actually held until now?

62245721
With picrel. Image from 3 days ago, but whatever.

62245775
fuck link chuddies

62245782
>>62244013
I'm still here taking a shit from my venice hotel room rn. Link will moon, you will see. It's just taking longer than expected. Which is a golden opportunity for those who missed the others.

62245800
>>62245517
>You've been spending literal years of your life comparing other people's ROI like this.

don't be so dramatic. it's an investment board. calculating gains/losses and opportunity cost is part of the discussion.


>>62245561
>I think it's a lot dumber than that even, they're blaming the project for the market.
>Basically pic related.

i think you have to tell yourself that lie in order to protect your ego. you have to tell yourself there's just no way an investor can't understand your genius play. they would have to be indian scammers to not see it

pretty juvenile thinking but i guess when you're down 5+ years straight and just missed the bull market, you have to come up with something

62245837
>>62245782
Literally nothing will pump this shitcoin, it will suffer the same fate as Kleros, an infinite permableed until a massive -50% wick destroys the spirit of remaining 2017 bagholders.
There are no net new big wallets, same baggies rotating the same bags, pretending staking yield makes up for a chart that looks like a stairway to hell.
Chainlink is one big permissioned, KYC'd, network, nobody with a crypto ethos wants to touch this trash with a 10-foot pole.
The biggest joke? LINK absorbed billions in TVL and still can't match LZ's volume.

62245840
>>62245721
>uncle rico bragging about gains from 7 years ago


bro we get it, you got some chicks' number in high school


the link cult is basically akin to boomers bragging about how they bought a house back in the day for $50k. they've conflated existing during a certain time period with having actual investment skill.

but that's the great thing about investing. even a blind squirrel finds a nut once in a while

62245849
Touch me

62246030
>>62244943
>>62245509
this
what the faggots don't realize is that xrp has had like 11 years for you to buy where you'd still be up and like 2 weeks in 2018 and last year to buy to be down
chainlink has had many more years for you to buy to be down and it's newer than xrp
thankfully I'm not down or I'd hate link (and myself) even more

62247125
>>62244939
>It's not really bag holding because I bought at 30 cent
you watched it do an inverse 10x, that qualifies

62248627
>>62247125

LINK fuddies = top buyers

62248634
>>62248627

$53

>2026
$9

cuckoldry is a hell of a drug

62251394
>>62240967
the tokenomics and project development are better than the rest

chainlink reserve and payment abstraction mean the project growth and fees get converted into LINK

62254623
>>62240967 dude just bet on redcoin
>>62240992 kek

62254629
>>62245492
if you're so smart, show your trades asshole
turns out you make the best guesses you can like the rest of us
>redcoin.png

62256158
>>62244357
love it when stupid stankies brag about their OTHER gains lmaooooooo yeah cuz u ain't braggin about link that's for sure

62257462
>>62248634

fuddies = top buyers

62257467
>>62257462
>if you make fun of my shitcoin bags you bought the top

item.title: My parents are renters in their late 60's They're going to get an inheritance soon, but they said "if we can't afford to… — 41 replies — 4.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
My parents are renters in their late 60's They're going to get an inheritance soon, but they said "if we can't afford to…

Open thread • Replies: 41 • Updated: 2026-05-21 10:49 UTC

OP

My parents are renters in their late 60's

They're going to get an inheritance soon, but they said "if we can't afford to get the house we want to buy, then we aren't gona buy one, and we'll just leave the money in the bank and get interest"

How can I convince them to not be fucking retarded and just buy a fucking house?

If they live another 20 years that money will be fucking destroyed from inflation and then i'll get nothing, but at least if they buy a house it will have protected the value of their inheritance.


I bet im gona have to deal with 4chan telling me "ERM ACTUALLY UR PARENTS ARE RIGHT, THEY SHOULD KEEP THE MONEY IN THE BANK AND LIVE OFF THE INTEREST, DONT TELL THEM TO BUY A HOUSE!" because 4chan has to always be contrarian to the OP
fyi: The reason my parents never became home owners is because my mom could never "find the perfect house" and she "didn't want to buy something that isnt exactly what she wanted" and shes doing this shit again now when they finally have a chance to soon 1-shot purchase a home and never have to worry about rent again.

Early replies (first 3)

62253481
Nobody cares about your boomer parents lil nigga.

62253664
>>62253429
Tell them to buy a house if they care at least a little bit about You and what will happen with You after they die. Tell them that You're willing to help they with maintenance around the house would they like to. Tell them that it will help You later in life too. That its one of the better ways to preserve value. Or at the very least convince then to give You at least small part of their inheritance. If nothing will do, You're basically wasting Your breath on them as they dont give a damn shit about You.

Typical stupid foid behavior. I don't even know on whom You should be angrier more. Your mom for being spoiled bitch or Your father for being spineless? 62254681

>Never have to pay rent again

62254910
Never understood why people care about inheritence by the time my parents got anything they were in their late 60s like by that time you are too old to enjoy it anyways just work on making g your own money instead of waiting until you are old for some windfall that might not even happen

62255574
>If they live another 20 years that money will be fucking destroyed

You should live your life like you're not getting a cent from them and hope for the best. There's really nothing you can say that will change their minds about their money, and giving them advice is only going to make them resent you and spend it on stupider shit to teach you a lesson. It's not a way to live life either, waiting around for your parents to die so you can get an inheritance instead of dealing in the real world. It's a subconscious thing, you expect an inheritance in the future so you spend more now, maybe not work as hard, etc. Just hope for the best man, its out of your control and theres no use stressing out over it.

62257207
>>62256102
Are you dumb?

Its not the house I care about, its allowing their inheritances not to go to waste

I dont know where you guys live, but in my state, even completely run down shit boxes still go up like crazy every year, because its the location/land that people want, they dont care about the shitbox thats sitting ontop of it

I dont give a fuck if the house is run down in the next 20 years, the point is theyre parking their inheritance in an asset they can live in until they die, so then i can sell it and actually get a good amount of it, instead of it sitting in cash for the next 20 years as its value dwindles down to nothing


Again, there are literal shitboxes without running gas or electricity here, that are completely run down, which still sell for a million dollars, because of the location/land.
